default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Gather feedback on GrowthX's content services for Superhuman and explore opportunities for deeper collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Superhuman sees positive traction from GrowthX content after 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)
  - [Harmony seeks more strategic guidance, deeper data insights, and expanded content types (e.g. thought leadership, gated assets)](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [GrowthX's new platform offers advanced AI-driven content creation and workflow automation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Plans made for a strategy deep-dive session to explore expanded collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

## Topics

### Current Engagement Status

  - [GrowthX providing SEO-focused content for Superhuman, replacing previous underperforming agency](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Content production running smoothly with minimal oversight needed from Superhuman team](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Seeing positive traction after 2-3 months of content production](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Rick from Superhuman helping with editing, no major issues reported](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### Desired Improvements

  - [More proactive strategic guidance on market trends and content focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Deeper data insights beyond high-level traffic graphs](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Easily shareable wins and data points for internal reporting (e.g. screenshots, 3-bullet summaries)](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Weekly updates with quick data snapshots preferred](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Superhuman's Evolving Needs

  - [Shifting focus to upper SMB admin market and new AI transformation/business ops leader personas](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Need for richer thought leadership content and gated/ungated assets to drive leads](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [Desire to avoid hiring full-time content staff if possible](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Interest in leveraging GrowthX for diverse content types beyond blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### GrowthX Platform Capabilities

  - [AI-driven content creation with built-in fact-checking and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Custom workflow engines for research, graphics generation, and content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Ability to create programmatic lead-gen assets and data-driven insights](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Potential to scale up thought leadership content from podcast/speaking engagements](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1762.0)

### Superhuman's Business Context

  - [Marketing team exceeding goals, driving 98% of revenue](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
  - [Challenges with junior sales team performance](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Recent strategic shifts: pushing smaller businesses to self-serve, focusing on new AI-related personas](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule 1-hour strategy deep-dive session for week of July 8th](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Explore format as potential lunch & learn with Superhuman team (remote or in-office)](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare insights from other clients and use cases for the session](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)
  - [Harmony to consider attending Dan Amadi's event with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine weekly updates with more actionable data insights](https://fathom.video/share/yuy_qJAJqB21hg8ZMhnsy7oBE2rTgVxc?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)

Explore scaling LinkedIn post creation from podcast/speaking content for Superhuman team (Harmony, Rahul, others). Demo workflow.
